label: Initial Inquiry
subject: Inquiry About {address}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

I'm interested in the {beds}BR/{baths}BA unit at {address} listed at ${price}/month. Is it still available? Could we arrange a viewing?

Best,
{user_name}

label: Tour Request
subject: Tour Request – {address}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

I'd love to schedule a tour for {address}. I'm available on {tour_date} around {tour_time}. Please let me know if that works.

Best,
{user_name}

label: SMS Inquiry
body: Hi, I'm interested in the {beds}BR at {address} for ${price}/mo. Is it available? – {user_name}
